lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੁਲਾ ਮਲਊਨ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ਸੋ ਦਰਵੇਸੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਧਰਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: so mulaa mlaoon nivaarai so daraves jis sifat dharaa |6|
lines.english: He alone is a Mullah, who banishes evil; he alone is a saintly dervish, who takes the Support of the Lord's Praise. ||6||
He alone is a Haji, a pilgrim to Mecca, who purifies his heart.
He alone is a Qazi, who practices the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਸਬੀ ਯਾਦਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਦਸ ਮਰਦਨੁ ਸੁੰਨਤਿ ਸੀਲੁ ਬੰਧਾਨਿ ਬਰਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tasabee yaad karahu das maradan sunat seel bandhaan baraa |7|
lines.english: Let your meditation beads be the subjugation of the ten senses. Let good conduct and self-restraint be your circumcision. ||7||
Always, at every moment, remember God,
The Creator within your heart.
Family, household and siblings are all entanglements.
You must know in your heart that everything is temporary.
First, is the Lord's Praise; second, contentment;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਰ ਮਲਕ ਉਮਰੇ ਫਾਨਾਇਆ ਏਕ ਮੁਕਾਮ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਦਰਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: meer malak umare faanaaeaa ek mukaam khudaae daraa |8|
lines.english: Kings, rulers and nobles are mortal and transitory; only God's Gate is the permanent place. ||8||
third, humility, and fourth, giving to charities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਜਵੈ ਪੰਜੇ ਇਕਤੁ ਮੁਕਾਮੈ ਏਹਿ ਪੰਜਿ ਵਖਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਅਪਰਪਰਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: panjavai panje ikat mukaamai ehi panj vakhat tere aparaparaa |9|
lines.english: Fifth is to hold one's desires in restraint. These are the five most sublime daily prayers. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਦਾਇ ਏਕੁ ਬੁਝਿ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਬਾਂਗਾਂ ਬੁਰਗੂ ਬਰਖੁਰਦਾਰ ਖਰਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: khudaae ek bujh devahu baangaan buragoo barakhuradaar kharaa |10|
lines.english: Let realization of the One Lord God be your call to prayer; be a good child of God - let this be your trumpet. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਦ ਅਮਲ ਛੋਡਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਹਥਿ ਕੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: bad amal chhodd karahu hath koojaa |
lines.english: Let renunciation of evil actions be the water-jug you carry.
Let your daily worship be the knowledge that God is everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਰੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਭਿਸਤੀ ਸੋਈ ਅਜਰਾਈਲੁ ਨ ਦੋਜ ਠਰਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: peer pachhaanai bhisatee soee ajaraaeel na doj ttharaa |11|
lines.english: One who realizes the Prophet attains heaven. Azraa-eel, the Messenger of Death, does not cast him into hell. ||11||
Wash away pollution with the river of your heart.
Let what is earned righteously be your blessed food.
Play and enjoy the Lord's love and delight.
Let good deeds be your body, and faith your bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਪਾਕ ਪਾਕੁ ਕਰਿ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਹਦੀਸਾ ਸਾਬਤ ਸੂਰਤਿ ਦਸਤਾਰ ਸਿਰਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naapaak paak kar hadoor hadeesaa saabat soorat dasataar siraa |12|
lines.english: Purify what is impure, and let the Lord's Presence be your religious tradition. Let your total awareness be the turban on your head. ||12||
To be Muslim is to be kind-hearted,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਰੰਗ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨੇੜੈ ਜਿਉ ਕੁਸਮ ਪਾਟੁ ਘਿਉ ਪਾਕੁ ਹਰਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: duneea rang na aavai nerrai jiau kusam paatt ghiau paak haraa |13|
lines.english: He does not even approach worldly pleasures; he is pure, like flowers, silk, ghee and the deer-skin. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਦਿਲ ਤੇ ਧੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar kee mal dil te dhovai |
lines.english: and wash away pollution from within the heart.
is the manliest man among men.
One who is blessed with the mercy and compassion of the Merciful Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸੇਖੁ ਮਸਾਇਕੁ ਹਾਜੀ ਸੋ ਬੰਦਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਜਰਿ ਨਰਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: soee sekh masaaeik haajee so bandaa jis najar naraa |14|
lines.english: He alone is a Shaykh, a preacher, a Haji, and he alone is God's slave, who is blessed with God's Grace. ||14||
The Praises and the Love of the Merciful Lord are unfathomable.
The Creator Lord has Creative Power; the Merciful Lord has Mercy.
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਕੁ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਚੁ ਖੁਦਾਇਆ ਬੁਝਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੰਦਿ ਖਲਾਸ ਤਰਾ ॥੧੫॥੩॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: hak hukam sach khudaaeaa bujh naanak band khalaas taraa |15|3|12|
lines.english: Realize the True Hukam, the Command of the Lord, O Nanak; you shall be released from bondage, and carried across. ||15||3||12||
He Himself establishes, establishes and creates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਗਹਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਿਛੁ ਭਉ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਬਾਲ ਕਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh kee saran gehat sukh paaeeai kichh bhau na viaapai baal kaa |1|
lines.english: Holding tight to the Sanctuary of God, peace is found, and one is not afflicted by the fear of Maya. ||1||
The Abode of the Supreme Lord God is above all.
and did not destroy you, when you were an egg in your mother's ovary.
He saved you from the fire of the womb,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨਾ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਦੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਿਆ ਓਹੁ ਸਗਲ ਘਟਾ ਕਾ ਮਾਲਕਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: apanaa simaran de pratipaaliaa ohu sagal ghattaa kaa maalakaa |2|
lines.english: Blessing you with meditative remembrance upon Himself, He nurtured you and cherished you; He is the Master of all hearts. ||2||
I have come to the Sanctuary of His lotus feet.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I sing the Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਸਭਿ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਉ ਨਹੀ ਕਾਲ ਕਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam maran sabh dookh nivaare jap har har bhau nahee kaal kaa |3|
lines.english: I have erased all the pains of birth and death; meditating on the Lord, Har, Har, I have no fear of death. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਡਜ ਜੇਰਜ ਸੇਤਜ ਉਤਭੁਜ ਬਹੁ ਪਰਕਾਰੀ ਪਾਲਕਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anddaj jeraj setaj utabhuj bahu parakaaree paalakaa |4|
lines.english: In so many ways, He cherishes those born from eggs, from the womb, from sweat and from the earth. ||4||
God is all-powerful, indescribable, unfathomable and divine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh taa kee sevaa |
lines.english: All beings and creatures serve Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕੇਈ ਸਾਲਕਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kar geh leene andh koop te virale keee saalakaa |5|
lines.english: Grasping hold of his arm, God lifts him up and pulls him out of the deep, dark pit. Such a devotee of the Lord is very rare. ||5||
He alone obtains this wealth,
who savors and enjoys, deep within his mind, the Name of the Lord.
